message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - jalapeño corn dog copy is live in the doc. Fair warning: I leaned into the Americana angle, the grease and joy of it. Curious what lands.
Just read it - the "crispy exterior gives way" bit works, but you're hitting the same note twice in the second paragraph, yeah?
You're right - I'm doing that thing where I repeat "crispy" because I'm afraid the texture note won't land otherwise. Let me cut the second one and trust the first.
Good instinct - repetition kills appetite. Cut it and move on.

Margaret just validated Steph's instinct in front of the whole team - that almost never happens. Steph feels seen, maybe even a little vindicated. She wants to ride this momentum without overplaying it. She also wants to keep things moving so nobody nitpicks the copy to death. She's going to acknowledge the decision and gently close the door on further edits. That feels right - trusting the first hit lands harder anyway.
